# Value Kinds

Valid values for `types`, `allowedKinds` in the `enforce-variable-use` rule config.

In the Example values column, `<...>` denotes a CSS unit (e.g. `<px>` means values like `16px`).

## Common kinds

| Kind                   | Example values                         | Example properties                                        |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `color`                | `red`, `tan`, `aqua`, `hsl()`          | `color`, `background-color`, `border-color`               |
| `length`               | `<cap>`, `<ch>`, `<cm>`, `anchor()`    | `width`, `margin`, `padding`, `font-size`                 |
| `length-percentage`    | `50%`, `<px>`, `<em>`                  | `width`, `margin`, `padding`                              |
| `percentage`           | `50%`                                  | `opacity`, `width`                                        |
| `number`               | `0`, `1.5`, `progress()`               | `opacity`, `flex-grow`, `line-height`                     |
| `integer`              | `0`, `1`, `sibling-count()`            | `z-index`, `order`, `column-count`                        |
| `angle`                | `<deg>`, `<grad>`, `<rad>`             | `transform`, `rotate`                                     |
| `time`                 | `<ms>`, `<s>`                          | `transition-duration`, `animation-duration`               |
| `resolution`           | `<dpcm>`, `<dpi>`, `<dppx>`            | `resolution`                                              |
| `string`               | `leader()`, `string()`                 | `content`                                                 |
| `url`                  | `url()`, `url-pattern()`               | `background-image`                                        |
| `image`                | `src()`, `image()`                     | `background-image`, `list-style-image`                    |
| `display`              | `flex`, `flow`, `grid`                 | `display`                                                 |
| `position`             | `top`, `left`, `right`                 | `background-position`, `object-position`                  |
| `line-style`           | `inset`, `ridge`, `solid`              | `border-style`, `outline-style`                           |
| `easing-function`      | `ease`, `linear`, `ease-in`, `steps()` | `transition-timing-function`, `animation-timing-function` |
| `filter`               | `blur()`, `sepia()`                    | `filter`, `backdrop-filter`                               |
| `transform-function`   | `skew()`, `scale()`                    | `transform`                                               |
| `font-weight-absolute` | `bold`, `normal`                       | `font-weight`                                             |
| `generic-family`       | `math`, `serif`, `cursive`             | `font-family`                                             |
| `flex`                 | `<fr>`                                 | `grid-template-columns`                                   |
| `frequency`            | `<hz>`, `<khz>`                        | `voice-pitch`                                             |

## Misc

| Kind                             | Example values                                                    |
| -------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `absolute-size`                  | `large`, `small`, `medium`                                        |
| `alignment`                      | `end`, `safe`, `first`                                            |
| `an+b`                           | `odd`, `even`                                                     |
| `anchor-side`                    | `end`, `top`, `left`                                              |
| `anchor-size`                    | `block`, `width`, `height`                                        |
| `animateable-feature`            | `contents`, `scroll-position`                                     |
| `animation-composition`          | `add`, `replace`, `accumulate`                                    |
| `animation-direction`            | `reverse`, `alternate`, `alternate-reverse`                       |
| `animation-fill-mode`            | `both`, `forwards`, `backwards`                                   |
| `animation-play-state`           | `paused`, `running`                                               |
| `animation-timeline`             | `auto`, `none`, `view()`, `scroll()`                              |
| `arc-size`                       | `large`, `small`                                                  |
| `arc-sweep`                      | `cw`, `ccw`                                                       |
| `attachment`                     | `fixed`, `local`, `scroll`                                        |

| `autospace`                      | `insert`, `replace`, `punctuation`                                |

| `compat-auto`                    | `meter`, `radio`, `button`                                        |

| `composite-mode`                 | `xor`, `copy`, `clear`                                            |

| `font-tech`                      | `palettes`, `variations`, `incremental`                           |
| `font-variant-css2`              | `small-caps`, `normal`                                            |
| `font-width-css3`                | `expanded`, `condensed`, `semi-expanded`                          |
| `grid-track`                     | `minmax()`, `repeat()`                                            |

| `init-descriptor-name`           | `hash`, `port`, `search`                                          |
| `isolation-mode`                 | `isolate`, `auto`                                                 |
| `keyframe-selector`              | `to`, `from`                                                      |
| `leader-type`                    | `solid`, `space`, `dotted`                                        |
| `legacy-pseudo-element-selector` | `after`, `first-line`, `first-letter`                             |
| `ligature-values`                | `common-ligatures`, `no-common-ligatures`, `historical-ligatures` |
| `line-width`                     | `thin`, `thick`, `medium`                                         |
| `masking-mode`                   | `alpha`, `luminance`, `match-source`                              |
| `navigation-location-keyword`    | `at`, `to`, `from`                                                |
| `navigation-type-keyword`        | `back`, `reload`, `forward`                                       |
| `numeric-figure-values`          | `lining-nums`, `oldstyle-nums`                                    |
| `numeric-fraction-values`        | `stacked-fractions`, `diagonal-fractions`                         |
| `numeric-spacing-values`         | `tabular-nums`, `proportional-nums`                               |
| `page-size`                      | `legal`, `ledger`, `letter`                                       |
| `position-area`                  | `any`, `end`, `top`                                               |
| `pseudo-page`                    | `blank`, `first`, `right`                                         |

| `request-modifier`               | `integrity()`, `cross-origin()`                                   |
| `rounding-strategy`              | `up`, `down`, `nearest`                                           |
| `scroll-button-direction`        | `up`, `down`, `left`                                              |
| `semitones`                      | `<st>`                                                            |
| `shape-command-position`         | `top`, `left`, `right`                                            |
| `snap`                           | `snap-block()`, `snap-inline()`                                   |
| `source`                         | `root`, `self`, `nearest`                                         |
| `spacing-trim`                   | `trim-all`, `space-all`, `trim-both`                              |
| `step-position`                  | `end`, `start`, `jump-end`                                        |
| `symbols-type`                   | `fixed`, `cyclic`, `numeric`                                      |
| `syntax-type-name`               | `url`, `time`, `angle`                                            |
| `system-family-name`             | `icon`, `menu`, `caption`                                         |
| `text-edge`                      | `cap`, `text`, `alphabetic`                                       |
| `track-breadth`                  | `max-content`, `min-content`, `auto`                              |
